claim.statement: Do not hide essential content or actions behind hover-only interactions on touch devices, which lack a reliable hover state. Provide an equivalent tap/click affordance and gate hover-enhanced styling behind (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) media queries.

limitations: Hybrid devices with both touch and pointer require any-hover/any-pointer handling

do: Expose hover-revealed actions via a persistent or tap-revealed control on touch
Use @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) to scope hover enhancements
Design the no-hover, coarse-pointer experience first
avoid: Row actions or menus that only appear on :hover
Tooltips that carry information available nowhere else

strategies: wrap hover styles in pointer/hover media queries
